message:
🐛 Replace inline spacing values with Tailwind classes (#10044)

Extract raw px values in WidgetExportModal (canvas preview) and
PodRelatedTab (tree-drawing) into named constants, improving
consistency and satisfying the no-magic-numbers rule.

Fixes #10038

Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
